entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, SkiaSharp.SKPoint p, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

params.canvas: The canvas on which to draw.
params.p: The point at which to place the top-left corner of the surface.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when drawing.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw without additional effects.

fields.summary: Draws the contents of this surface onto the specified canvas at the given point using the specified sampling options.

entries.signature: public void Draw (SkiaSharp.SKCanvas canvas, float x, float y, SkiaSharp.SKSamplingOptions sampling, SkiaSharp.SKPaint paint = default);

params.canvas: The canvas on which to draw.
params.x: The x-coordinate of the top-left corner.
params.y: The y-coordinate of the top-left corner.
params.sampling: The sampling options to use when drawing.
params.paint: The paint to apply, or <see langword="null" /> to draw without additional effects.

fields.summary: Draws the contents of this surface onto the specified canvas at the given coordinates using the specified sampling options.
